Improper handling of resource allocation in virtual machines can lead to information exposure in Snapdragon Consumer IOT, Snapdragon Industrial IOT, Snapdragon Mobile

A flaw in the management of resource allocation within virtual machines can result in unauthorized information disclosure in Snapdragon Consumer IoT, Snapdragon Industrial IoT, and Snapdragon Mobile platforms.
